title: 10PCS Xmas Gift Boxes for Presents - 'Merry Christmas' Design for Candy, Chocolates & Xmas Packaging, Mini Boxes with Ribbons, Ideal for Holiday Decor, Party Favors & Stocking Stuffers (Red)
features: Festive Christmas Design & Premium Quality：Adorned with golden “Merry Christmas” lettering and a Santa sleigh pattern, these gift boxes feature a vibrant red hue and elegant satin bow, perfectly capturing the Christmas spirit. Crafted from sturdy paper material, they are durable enough to hold gifts while adding a touch of sophistication to your holiday gifting.

Elevate Your Holiday Gifting Experience：Whether you’re sending gifts to loved ones or adding a festive touch to your retail products, these Christmas gift boxes make every present feel more thoughtful and celebratory. They’re a must-have for anyone looking to impress with stylish, holiday-ready packaging.

Perfect Size for Small Gifts (11.5×10×4.5cm, 10 Pcs Set)：With dimensions of 11.5×10×4.5cm, each box is ideal for packing chocolates, small candies, jewelry, or other tiny treats. The set of 10 ensures you have enough for family, friends, colleagues, or even as party favors for Christmas gatherings.

Convenient & Versatile for Gifting：Designed with a handy ribbon closure, these boxes are easy to open and close, saving you time on gift preparation. Beyond Christmas, they can also be used for New Year celebrations, winter-themed events, or as decorative storage for small items.

Ideal for Chocolate & More：Specially sized to fit chocolates (including truffles, pralines, or chocolate bars), these boxes keep your edible gifts secure and presentable. They’re also great for non-food items like mini ornaments, gift cards, or small skincare samples.
description: Description Color: Red Material: Paper Occasion: Anniversary, Birthday, Christmas, Good Luck, Thank You Included Components: Gift Box, Ribbon Theme: Cartoon, Christmas Tree Number of Items: 10 Pattern: Christmas Packing List: Gift boxes * 10 Ribbons * 10 Notice： Due to manual measurement, there may be a 1-2cm error.
